title: Valutazione Trimestrale — La Famiglia e le Relazioni

criteria.name: grammatical_accuracy
criteria.descriptor: Correct use of possessive adjectives, irregular verbs (avere, essere, fare)

criteria.name: communicative_effectiveness
criteria.descriptor: Describes family members and relationships clearly

criteria.name: creative_expression
criteria.descriptor: Adds anecdotes, comparisons, or personal reflections

sample_grading_notes: Same pattern: grammar is gate for 'eccellente'. A creative piece with errors cannot score top marks. This is consistent across all units.

adaptations_provided.foundational: picture prompts, fill-in-the-blank for written portion, oral part allows English bridge
adaptations_provided.extended: no scaffold, compare Italian and American family structures, use passato prossimo
